title: DE21 6HA, 2 ZLF Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/AB3904UQ/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: 2 ZLF Limited Installation name: West Meadows Waste Recovery Facility Permit number: EPR/AB3904UQ  "
